text.p: I am here by complaining or requsting for your Advance To my complain made so far , pleases Sir, we have a poor road in our local area In - which it can cause more and more damage to our areas. Sir it can cause poor Transportation problem to our communitie in time of farm product which our farmer can produce in their farm and decided sale them for consumtion . Which they may like To Transport them first To market for selling. Sir, The consequences that will follow Whenever our road are not in good conditon tion it may lead To accident in our road and if it lead To accident all 1 word our farm product will be get destroye by accident and it may also lead to increase of death rate in our area. So Sir I want you To look into these such problem that can cause increase of death rate or do you like it that way, when death rate will be increase in your local area? Sir, if such a thing happen in your area people will hold you responsible for be in of all these damaged and some may even change you to court for being in of the incident So Sir, people may not be happy if , when such a things are happening in your area Sir, I want you to put this into consideration so that death rate can decrease not increase in your area.
